column2: The CF-Ctn[15-34] peptide showed a glass transition temperature (Tg) of 42.33 °C and an endothermic

column1: peak  of  229.3  °C.  PLGA  presented  a  Tg  of  42.27  °C  and  an  endothermic  peak  at  366.8  °C,  while  PVA
exhibited three endothermic events at 95.28, 188.3, and 315.6 °C. It is possible to observe that the same
thermal events observed for the isolated PVA and PLGA are also on the NP-CF-Ctn[15-34] curve. On the
other hand, crystallinity events related to the entrapped peptide was not detected since the TGA curve did
not show an endothermic peak related to this effect (see below).
